steps.name: Cursor movement commands: w b e 0 $ ^ gg G
criteria: w moves to next word start
b moves to previous word start
e moves to next word end
0 moves to line start and $ to line end
gg moves to document start and G to end

steps.name: Insert mode variants: I a A o O
criteria: I inserts at first non-blank of line
a inserts after cursor
A inserts at end of line
o opens new line below and enters insert
O opens new line above and enters insert

steps.name: Editing: J r cc C yy p dd dw undo redo
criteria: J joins current line with next line
yy yanks current line and p pastes it
cc replaces entire line entering insert
C replaces from cursor to line end
u undoes last change and Ctrl-r redoes

steps.name: Scroll and screen: H M L Ctrl-d Ctrl-u zz
criteria: H moves cursor to screen top
M moves cursor to screen middle
L moves cursor to screen bottom
Ctrl-d scrolls down half page
Ctrl-u scrolls up half page
